parameters.query: SELECT id, user_id, strategy, mode, symbol, side, entry_order_id, entry_fill_price, intended_stop, intended_target FROM public.trade_ledger WHERE status = 'open' AND mode = 'paper' AND entry_order_id IS NOT NULL ORDER BY created_at LIMIT 50

parameters.content:
## QET H4 - Exit-Fill Sync

Every 5 min: polls open trade_ledger rows (paper), fetches Alpaca order + bracket legs, writes entry fills, exit fills, and busted (never-filled) states back to the ledger. The DB trigger derives slippage, net P&L, and R on close. Audit row every run with work done; Telegram alert only when trades close or bust.

Live-mode rows are NOT processed yet - extend the SELECT and add Alpaca-LIVE credential when live trading starts.
